chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter must include:
the signature of the manager of transportation of the port authority;
a statement of the kind of cargo being transported, the maximum weight and dimensions of the equipment, and the kind and weight of each commodity to be transported;
a statement of any condition on which the permit is issued;
a statement that the cargo may only be transported on roadways that are owned and maintained by the port authority and located in San Patricio County or Nueces County; and
the location where the cargo was loaded.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.
